title: The Cattle Raid of Fraech
description: The most beautiful man in Ireland braves a monster-infested lake to win the woman he loves.
introduction: The most beautiful man in Ireland braves a monster-infested lake to win the woman he loves.

translation.original_text: Fraech mac Idaith meic Bé Find, do Chonnachtaib, ba maith a chinél.
translation.text: Fraech son of Idath, of the Connachta — his lineage was noble.
